basic_details.job_title: IIT Delhi Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Delhi (IIT Delhi) Recruitment 2026 for 1 post of Project Attendant. Candidates with 12th Pass, ITi Diploma Can Apply Online. The last date to apply online is 25-05-2026. The candidate shall apply online through IIT Delhi official website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for IIT Delhi Project Attendant Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
